meta.title: Pre-Debug Factorial Fixes Needed Before 4th Pass
meta.context: Captured from conversation context during plan archive recovery. This document lists the fixes and verifications needed before launching the 4th debug factorial pass on GCP.

section.name: factorial-scope
section.description: The debug factorial is the FULL production factorial with reduced epochs (2), data (half), and folds (1). All other factors are identical to production: all models, all losses, all calibration methods, all post-training methods, all zero-shot baselines.

section.name: known-fixes-needed
section.item: LoRA adapter weight initialization must match SAM3 paper exactly. Current implementation may have incorrect rank or target layers.
Conditional model tests: SAM3 tests must skip gracefully when GPU VRAM is insufficient (less than 16 GB).
Post-training config: only "none" and "swag" are valid options. Config validation must reject other values.
SkyPilot YAML must use Docker image_id, never bare VM setup.
DVC data pull must be verified in setup script before training starts.

section.name: verification-checklist
section.check: All factorial configs generate valid Hydra overrides
Docker base image builds successfully with all dependencies
SkyPilot dry-run succeeds for at least one factorial cell
MLflow tracking URI resolves from within Docker container
DVC remote is accessible from GCP compute instance
